text: The surgeon utilizes a thirty-degree camera scope, adjusting the console interface to switch between upward and downward facing views.
The camera view is adjusted to look downwards, displaying the surgical instruments positioned towards the top of the screen.
The operator uses the camera to obtain a full view of the purple socket on the far side of the sphere, while grasping the purple peg with the instrument.
The surgeon performs a scope swap to facilitate the placement of the second green peg, adjusting the view to ensure precise positioning within the sphere.
